segments.speaker: Manager
segments.text: Hi there. What can I help you with?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hi, I just moved in, and I wanted to ask a few basic building questions.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: First, where do packages usually get delivered? I don't want to miss anything important.

segments.speaker: Manager
segments.text: Most packages go to the mailroom. You'll get an email when one arrives.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. And where are trash and recycling?

segments.speaker: Manager
segments.text: Trash is in the back room, recycling is the blue bin next to it.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. If I have a maintenance issue, should I call or submit a request online?

segments.speaker: Manager
segments.text: Online is best. If it's urgent, call the office.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. One last thing - if the heat or hot water acts up, is that considered urgent?

segments.speaker: Manager
segments.text: Hot water, yes. Heat depends on the season, but report it right away.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. That's exactly what I needed.
